{{Infobox artifact
| name = Dream Well water
| introduced = cradle-05-ghostwater
}}

== Ghostwater ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|[[Orthos]] and [[Lindon]] were sustained by the [[Dream Well water]].<ref name="cradle-05-ghostwater-c9">''Ghostwater'', chapter 9</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|[[Lindon]] drinks a vial of [[Dream Well water]].<ref name="cradle-05-ghostwater-c13">''Ghostwater'', chapter 13</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|[[Little Blue]] lands on a jar filled with [[Dream Well water]].<ref name="cradle-05-ghostwater-c16">''Ghostwater'', chapter 16</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

[[Category:Artifacts]]
[[Category:Ghostwater]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle artifacts]]
